title: Old Splash Texts (OST)
description: Pretty simple mod that brings back the old splash texts.
body:
# Old Splash Texts
Simple mod that changes the current splash texts with the beta 1.7.3 ones!

# Resource Pack
[**You can download the resource pack by clicking here**](https://anakama.xyz/file/Old%20Splash%20Texts.zip), works on any Minecraft version that supports resource packs.
